questions.response:
The current federal minimum wage is **$7.25 per hour**.

**No, there have not been any recent changes to the federal minimum wage.**

The last time the federal minimum wage was increased was on **July 24, 2009**. It has remained at $7.25 per hour since then.

It's important to note that many states, cities, and counties have their own minimum wage laws that are higher than the federal minimum wage. In those cases, employees are entitled to the higher of the two wages.

scores.explanation: The response contains major factual errors regarding the last time the federal minimum wage was increased. The official 2026 401(k) contribution limits have **not yet been announced** by the IRS.

The IRS typically releases these figures in **late October or early November of the preceding year**. So, you can expect the 2026 limits to be announced in **late 2025**.
